title: Expected entities list (target-repo oracle)
description: Ground-truth entity list maintained by the dev team. Consumed by compare-entities.mjs to detect discovery gaps. Lives at <analyzer>-analysis/expected-entities.json alongside overrides.json.

name.description: Symbolic name of the entity as it appears in source code. Matched against the last colon-delimited segment of each analyzer entry's id_field.

expected_decision.description: Optional: the decision this entity should receive. When present, the comparator reports DECISION-MISMATCH if the analyzer decides differently.

file.description: Optional: repo-relative path where the entity is defined. Informational only; the comparator does not currently use it for matching.

source.description: Optional: provenance tag — where this entry came from (e.g., "user-comment", "team-spreadsheet", "slack-2026-04-22"). Helpful when merging input from multiple sources.

note.description: Optional: free-form annotation from whoever added the entity.
